zh.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Ange是Ioannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Ange的兒子，於1190年出生在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1259年享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Ange是Ioannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Ange的儿子，于1190年出生在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1259年享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ange
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: shortened form of Ainger, itself a variant of Angier .
French and Channel Islands: from the French personal name Ange, from ange ‘angel’ (see Angel ), or a nickname from this word. Compare Lange 2.

variants.name: Angier
meanings: French and English (of Norman and French Huguenot origin): from the Old French personal name Angier, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements ans ‘god’ + ger ‘spear’ (Old Norse geirr).

nameMeanings.name: ANGELOS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Marian name honouring Nuestra Señora de los Ángeles ‘Our Lady of the Angels’.

nameMeanings.name: (Duc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Luke
meanings: Middle English vernacular form of Lucas , Latin form of the post-classical Greek name Loukas ‘man from Lucania’. This owes its perennial popularity throughout Christian Europe to the fact that, from the 2nd century onwards, the third gospel in the New Testament has been ascribed to the Lucas or Luke mentioned at various places in Acts and in the Epistles. Little is known about him beyond the facts that he was a doctor, a Gentile, and a friend and convert of St Paul. The name was borne by the character Luke Skywalker in the film Star Wars ( 1977 ), and rose sharply in popularity in the 1990s.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Ange was born in 1190, in Ottoman Empire as the son of Ioannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Ange. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1259, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Ange est né en 1190, à Empire ottoman, fils de Ioannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Ange. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1259, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Ange wurde 1190 in Osmanisches Reich, als Sohn von Ioannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Ange geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1259 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Ange è nato il nel 1190 nel Impero ottomano come figlio di Ioannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Ange. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1259, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Angeは1190年にオスマン帝国でIoannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Angeの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1259年に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Ange(은)는 1190년 دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه에서 Ioannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Ange의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1259년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Ange nasceu em 1190, em Império Otomano filho de Ioannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Ange. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1259, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Ange родился в 1190 г. в местности Османская империя. Его отца звали Ioannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Ange. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1259 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Ioannes Komnenos ANGELOS (Duc de THRAKESION) Ange nació en 1190, en Imperio otomano como hijo de Ioannis Ioannes KomnTHRAKESION Ange. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1259, a la edad de 69 años.
